mapper.select: WITH ranked_messages AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS other_user_id, content, created_at, CASE WHEN receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_unread, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END ORDER BY created_at DESC ) AS rn FROM message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND deleted_by_sender = 0) OR (receiver_id = #{userId} AND deleted_by_receiver = 0) ) SELECT rm.other_user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar, rm.content AS lastMessage, rm.created_at AS lastTime, COALESCE(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount FROM ranked_messages rm JOIN "user" u ON rm.other_user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS other_user_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE AND deleted_by_receiver = 0 GROUP BY CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END ) unread ON rm.other_user_id = unread.other_user_id WHERE rm.rn = 1 ORDER BY rm.created_at DESC

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id AS senderId, s.nickname AS senderNickname, s.avatar AS senderAvatar, m.receiver_id AS receiverId, r.nickname AS receiverNickname, m.content, m.is_read AS isRead, m.created_at AS createdAt FROM message m JOIN "user" s ON m.sender_id = s.id AND s.deleted = 0 JOIN "user" r ON m.receiver_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ( (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{otherUserId} AND m.deleted_by_sender = 0) OR (m.sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted_by_receiver = 0) ) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message m WHERE ( (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{otherUserId} AND m.deleted_by_sender = 0) OR (m.sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted_by_receiver = 0) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE AND deleted_by_receiver = 0
